---
title: "Did Pre-trained Language Models Learn Grammars?"
description: "An ICLR 2020 paper on whether new training objectives could help pre-trained models learn grammars better."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-05-16"
categories: [NLP, paper, conference, linguistics, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![ICLR 2020. Image from [OpenReview](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=H1xPR3NtPB).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Did pre-trained language models learn grammars? To some degree.

Can we make them learn better with a different training objective?

Paper: <https://lnkd.in/gNnmN5H>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_iclr2020-nlp-activity-6667256122191286272-m9cX).*
